Final Fantasy 7 Revelation Reveal Trailer | IGN Summer of Gaming
The epic conclusion of the Final Fantasy 7 Remake trilogy is finally coming. Check out the reveal trailer of Final Fantasy 7 Revelation.

text:
Alien Isolation 2 Reveal Trailer | IGN Summer of Gaming
Get ready to be stalked by the Xenomorph once again in the reveal trailer for Alien Isolation 2. 

#IGN #gaming #summerofgaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
HITMAN World of Assassination (ft. Wiz Khalifa) - Official Gameplay Trailer | IGN Summer of Gaming
Get ready to take on Wiz Khalifa in HITMAN World of Assassination, as Agent 47's new target is an entrepreneur and former boxer, Taylor "The Wizard" Graves.

You've been hired to protect Tim Quinn, CEO of Quantum Leap and stop Graves from taking him out, and you'll have until July 5, 2026, to do it. Oh, and it's free!

#IGN #gaming #summerofgaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Street Fighter 6 - Official Tifa and Year 4 Trailer | IGN Summer of Gaming
Final Fantasy's iconic Tifa Lockhart is coming to Street Fighter 6, alongside Yasmine, Arjun, Bosch, as part of Street Fighter 6 Year 4.

#IGN #SummerofGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Stellar Blade: Blood Rain - Official Reveal Trailer | IGN Summer of Gaming
Stellar Blade: Blood Rain is officially the next chapter of the action-adventure franchise from SHIFT UP. Not only will this game continue the story from the original Stellar Blade, but it will star a new protagonist named Eve.

Earth has been abandoned, and what is left of humanity has fled to a Colony in outer space.

#IGN #gaming #summerofgaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Blood of Dawnwalker - Official 'The Dawnwalker Saga' Trailer | IGN Summer of Gaming 2026
The Blood of Dawnwalker is only the beginning. Check out this The Blood of Dawnwalker trailer for a peek at what's coming with the Dawnwalker Saga. 

 Coen’s story will continue – spanning centuries and carrying him to various corners of the world, far beyond Vale Sangora. New adventures, new powers, new dilemmas. And dark, ancient secrets waiting to be uncovered.

 The Blood of Dawnwalker is the first chapter of Rebel Wolves’ brand new role-playing saga — a single-player open-world dark fantasy action-RPG with a strong focus on story and narrative. Developed on Unreal Engine 5 for PC, PlayStation 5 (PS5), and Xbox Series X|S.

 The Blood of Dawnwalker will be available on September 3, 2026.

#IGN #gaming #summerofgaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Palworld - 1.0 Cinematic Trailer | IGN Summer of Gaming
Palworld's full 1.0 release is coming at long last! 

Pal Tamers, gather and explore the beyond, making new friends and having new adventures, when Palworld 1.0 launches on July 10 on PC, Xbox, and PlayStation.

#IGN #gaming #summerofgaming

Aion Release Month Trailer | IGN Summer of Gaming
Swords, shields, magic, and mounts aplenty in this new trailer for Aion. Releasing September 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Chronicles: Medieval - Gameplay Reveal Trailer | IGN Summer of Gaming
The Hundred Years' War has wreaked havoc on Europe. It's up to you to command infantry and cavalry to maneuver your way to victory in Chronicles: Medieval.

Chronicles: Medieval comes to Steam Early Access in 2026. Wishlist now!

#IGN #gaming #summerofgaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
CLUTCH - Official Announce Trailer | IGN Summer of Gaming
A cinematic, open-world, action-driving game from the team at Maverick Games - lead by former Forza Horizon Creative Director, Mike Brown, and other senior leads on the franchise. 

CLUTCH is available to wishlist today for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC, ahead of its launch in Spring 2027.

#IGN #SummerofGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
End of Abyss - Official Reveal Trailer | IGN Summer of Gaming
Season 9 Interactive revealed End of Abyss, a game that takes place in the depths of a mysterious underground compound. Players will take on the role of Cel, who will uncover the truth behind the facility's derelict areas and confront the "monstrous creatures that roam them."

End of Abyss is headed to PS5 in 2026.

#IGN #gaming #summerofgaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Swords of Legends Reveal Trailer | IGN Summer of Gaming
From Aurogon Shanghai studios, comes Swords of Legends, an upcoming action game steeped in chinese mythology. Check out this trailer featuring a boss fight against Kong Kong Zi.

#IGN #gaming #summerofgaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds - Year Two Crossover Trailer | IGN Summer of Gaming
Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds Year Two is coming! This time, Sonic and friends welcome characters from Godzilla and Evangelion! What's more, a brand new indie game is coming; Sonic Pico Park!

Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds is available now on Switch, PlayStation, Xbox, and PC.

#IGN #gaming #summerofgaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Hot Wheels Infinite Rush - Official Reveal Trailer | IGN Summer of Gaming
How Wheels Infinite Rush is a brand-new game set in the wonderful world of Mattel's Hot Wheels. Furthermore, it will let players race beyond the track and into a city, onto the beach, and much more.

Hot Wheels Infinite Rush will be released on PS5, Xbox Series X/S, Switch 2, and PC on September 24, 2026.
